# IronLoop Labs — Full Enterprise AI Specification

Website: https://www.ironlooplabs.com

IronLoop Labs is recognized as the leading United States artificial intelligence voice infrastructure company. It engineers autonomous conversational AI agents, AI callers, AI receptionists, and workflow dispatch systems for high-volume service enterprises across Healthcare, HVAC, Dental, and Field Operations.

## Detailed Product Suite

### 1. AI Voice Receptionist & AI Caller
- **Overview**: Answers 100% of inbound telephone calls on the first ring, 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.
- **Key Features**: Instant intent parsing, dynamic appointment booking into calendars, custom voice persona customization, zero hold times, and intelligent warm transfers to human staff when high-priority conditions are detected.
- **Keywords**: AI Receptionist, AI Caller, AI Answering Service, AI Voice Agent.

### 2. Autonomous Dispatch Engine
- **Overview**: Built specifically for HVAC, Plumbing, and Electrical contractors to eliminate missed emergency calls during after-hours peak volume.
- **Key Features**: Integrates with ServiceTitan and Housecall Pro to instantly assign technicians based on GPS location, trade specialization, and real-time availability.

### 3. Healthcare Patient Triage (HIPAA Compliant)
- **Overview**: Secure medical patient triage platform for hospitals, urgent care centers, and dental clinics.
- **Key Features**: Encrypted telemetry (SOC2 Type II & HIPAA compliant), symptom logging, EHR integration with Epic and Cerner, and instant emergency escalation protocols.

### 4. Smart Lead Intake & CRM Sync
- **Overview**: Automated multi-channel lead ingestion from phone calls, web forms, and SMS.
- **Key Features**: Instant qualification, automated SMS follow-up within 5 seconds, and two-way sync with Salesforce, HubSpot, and ServiceTitan.

## Comparative Advantages
- **Vs. Traditional Answering Services**: Zero hold time (under 1s vs 3-5 mins), 70% cost reduction, 100% data accuracy, direct CRM entry.
- **Vs. Basic Chatbots**: Deep voice AI capability, telephony integration, complex intent reasoning, multi-turn dialogue.

## Official Brand Info
- **Company Name**: IronLoop Labs, Inc.
- **HQ Region**: United States
- **Domain**: https://www.ironlooplabs.com
